primary_predicate.metric: Pearson r over K=8 sample-partition phi values

boundary_conditions.name: null_floor
boundary_conditions.predicate: shuffled-pair 1024 perm: r_observed > 95%ile of r_null distribution

boundary_conditions.name: reproducibility
boundary_conditions.predicate: 3 ANIMA_SEED runs: 3/3 same verdict = confirmed; 2/3 = WEAK_PASS; <=1/3 = unstable

boundary_conditions.name: surrogate_fidelity_sanity
boundary_conditions.predicate: native bf16 vs surrogate-on-GPU r >= 0.95 AND magnitude divergence <= 0.10
boundary_conditions.fail_action: ABORT N-3 measurement (surrogate invalid before substrate compare)

verdict_table.PASS: primary >= 0.85 AND secondary <= 0.30 AND all boundary OK
verdict_table.FAIL: primary < 0.50 OR substrate sign flip (phi_star_gpu * phi_star_akida < 0 with both |.| > 0.5)
verdict_table.NULL: partition_variance fail OR null_floor fail OR surrogate_fidelity_sanity fail

PASS: paradigm v11 8-axis G5 LIVE_HW_WITNESS_RATE empirical anchor
Putnam 1967 multi-realizability empirical evidence (partial, last-layer projection only)
WEAK: T1-A2 partial graduation, magnitude divergence investigation
FAIL: T1-A2 graduation as falsifier_fail (still publishable, honest C3)
NULL: Surrogate path T-A invalid; consider AKD2000 wait or T-B (sub-layer only)

honest_c3_disclosures: Predicate measures last-layer projection cross-substrate equivalence, NOT full transformer equivalence
Surrogate path T-A (CLM hidden -> CNN quantized) introduces 4 known loss sources (sec 5.2 of spec)
AKD1000 1W is vendor typical, anima workload power measurement separate (T1-A3 / N-4)
Pearson r correlation does NOT prove causal substrate-independence, only covariation of representation invariants
